suite.purpose: Controlled-output text prompt set for pre-SQ runtime TPS and output-health observation.
suite.decode_policy: greedy with tokenizer special-token stop policy and per-case task-aware stop_texts
changes_from_v0.2: uses shorter output contracts for quality-observed cases
adds blank-line stop_texts for direct-answer prompts
keeps the repeated long-prefill timing probe but excludes it from output-health scoring
